suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the `rust-fix-worker` procedure and skill-feedback contract for trivial mission-scoped fixes: either require workers who skip the red/TDD phase or mission-overridden full-workspace validation to set `followedProcedure: false` with explicit deviations, or relax those mandatory steps when the mission explicitly authorizes a narrower workflow.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This milestone's `fix-join-meeting-dismiss` review found the worker skipped the skill's failing-test-first requirement but still reported `followedProcedure: true`. The same issue was already recorded in `.factory/validation/ux-fixes/scrutiny/synthesis.json` and `.factory/validation/critical-fixes/scrutiny/synthesis.json`, so scrutiny's adherence signal remains unreliable across multiple milestones.
